debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R b s ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
classical
  -- reduce to independence of the corresponding coordinate maps on the stream component
  have h_id_a :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω)
        (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) a) 𝔓' 𝔓' := by
    refine IdentDistrib.comp_right (μ := 𝔓') (ν := 𝔓')
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a) (g := fun f s ↦ f (s - 1)) ?_
    · fun_prop
    · ext ω s
      cases s with
      | zero =>
        simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, Nat.zero_eq, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
      | succ s =>
        simp [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.succ_sub_one]
  have h_id_b :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω)
        (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) b) 𝔓' 𝔓' := by
    refine IdentDistrib.comp_right (μ := 𝔓') (ν := 𝔓')
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b) (g := fun f s ↦ f (s - 1)) ?_
    · fun_prop
    · ext ω s
      cases s with
      | zero =>
        simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, Nat.zero_eq, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
      | succ s =>
        simp [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.succ_sub_one]
  have h_ind_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) b) 𝔓' := by
    -- the stream component is independent across different actions
    have h_ind :
        IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun s ↦ ω (s - 1) a)
          (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun s ↦ ω (s - 1) b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      -- independence follows from iIndepFun across (α×ℕ)
      have hi : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ fun ω ↦ ω p.2 p.1) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
        simpa using iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure' ν
      have hI :
          IndepFun (fun ω ↦ fun s ↦ ω (s - 1) a)
            (fun ω ↦ fun s ↦ ω (s - 1) b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
        -- use independence of two disjoint subfamilies
        refine (hi.indepFun_subtype ?_ ?_).mono ?_ ?_
        · intro p q hp hq
          exact hab <| by simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using (congrArg Prod.fst (by simpa using hp.trans hq.symm))
        · intro ω; rfl
        · intro ω; rfl
      simpa using hI
    -- lift to product measure: function depends only on snd
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.prod, Prod.snd] using (h_ind.comp_left measurable_snd).comp_right measurable_snd
  exact (h_id_a.indepFun_iff.mp (h_id_b.indepFun_iff.mp h_ind_stream))

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  refine (indepFun_iff_condIndepFun (μ := 𝔓')
    (X := fun ω ↦ ())).2 ?_
  have h_indep :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω)
        ⟂ᵢ[(fun _ : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ()), measurable_const; 𝔓']
          (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) := by
    simpa using
      (condIndepFun_rewardByCount_of_ne (h := h) (a := a) (b := b) hab)
  simpa using h_indep

classical
  have hId_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have hId_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  refine (hId_a.indepFun_iff hId_b).2 ?_
  simpa [𝔓] using
    (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) (a := a) (b := b) hab)

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_ident_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_ident_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' := by
    classical
    have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun n ↦ ω n b)
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      have hi : iIndepFun (fun p : α × ℕ ↦ fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω p.2 p.1) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
        simpa [iIndepFun_pi_iff] using (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν)
      have h_indep' := hi.indepFun (s := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = a}) (t := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = b})
        (by
          intro p hp q hq hpq
          have : p.1 ≠ q.1 := by
            simpa [hp, hq] using hab
          exact Prod.ext (by simpa [hp, hq] using this) (by simpa using hpq))
      simpa [IndepFun, Set.indicator, Function.comp] using h_indep'
    have h_indep_prod :
        IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (fun n ↦ ω.2 n a))
          (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (fun n ↦ ω.2 n b)) 𝔓' := by
      simpa [𝔓', Measure.prod, IndepFun, Measure.snd] using (h_indep.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd)
    simpa [Function.comp] using h_indep_prod
  have h_indep_shift :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_indep_stream.identDistrib_left h_ident_a.symm).identDistrib_right h_ident_b.symm
  have h_indep_shift' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a n ω) (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b n ω) 𝔓' := by
    refine h_indep_shift.precomp (f := fun n ↦ n + 1) (g := fun n ↦ n + 1) ?_ ?_
    · fun_prop
    · fun_prop
  simpa [IndepFun] using h_indep_shift'

simpa [rewardByCount] using
    indepFun_rewardStream_rewardStream_of_ne (h := h) hab

have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
        (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h
  have h_ida :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω s a)
        𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h a
  have h_idb :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b)
        𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h b
  have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    classical
    simpa [indepFun_iff_iIndepFun] using
      (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν).indepFun (i := a) (j := b) hab
  have h_indep_a : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω)
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_ida.indepFun_iff h_idb).2 h_indep_stream
  simpa using h_indep_a.comp (g₁ := fun s : ℕ ↦ s - 1) (g₂ := fun s : ℕ ↦ s - 1)
    (measurable_const.sub measurable_id) (measurable_const.sub measurable_id)

classical
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_id_a :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [𝔓, Bandit.measure] using
      (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (μ := P) (ν := ν) hab).comp measurable_snd measurable_snd
  refine (h_id_a.indepFun_iff h_id_b).2 ?_
  have h_indep_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (μ := (Measure.dirac ())) (ν := ν) hab
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 · a) (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 · b) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.snd, Measure.map_map] using
      (indepFun_snd_prod (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) (X := fun ω ↦ ω · a)
        (Y := fun ω ↦ ω · b) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) h_indep_stream')
  simpa [𝔓] using h_indep_prod

classical
  have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
        (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all (A := A) (R := R) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (P := P) h
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
      (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_of_ne (ν := fun i : ℕ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) (hab := hab))
  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω)
        𝔓' := by
    refine (h_id.indepFun_map ?_).1 h_indep_stream
    · refine measurable_pi_lambda (fun p ↦ ?_)
      fun_prop
    · refine measurable_pi_lambda (fun p ↦ ?_)
      fun_prop
  simpa using h_indep'.comp (g₁ := fun s ↦ s - 1) (g₂ := fun s ↦ s - 1)

simpa [rewardByCount] using
    indepFun_prod_stream_rewardByCount_of_ne (h := h) (a := a) (b := b) hab

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  -- `rewardByCount` reads only the reward stream at the corresponding action,
  -- so for distinct actions it depends on disjoint coordinates of the product measure.
  refine indepFun_fst_snd_of_forall_indepFun ?_ ?_
  · intro s
    -- depends on `ω.1` (algorithm randomness) and the `a`-coordinates of `ω.2`
    -- but not on the `b`-coordinates
    exact indepFun_rewardByCount_stream h a ▸
      (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) (a := a) (b := b) hab).comp_left
        (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (by fun_prop)
  · intro s
    exact indepFun_rewardByCount_stream h b ▸
      (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) (a := b) (b := a) hab.symm).comp_left
        (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (by fun_prop)

simpa [rewardByCount] using indepFun_prod (μ := 𝔓')
    (X := fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ ω.2 (stepsUntil A a s ω.1) a)
    (Y := fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ ω.2 (stepsUntil A b s ω.1) b)
    (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  simpa [rewardByCount, hab] using
    (indepFun_prod_of_disjoint_eval (μ := 𝔓') (ν := ν) (a := a) (b := b) hab)

have h_id_a :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.snd_measure] using
      (indepFun_prod_of_indepFun_snd
        (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
        (X := fun ω : (Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) ↦ ω.2)
        (Y := fun ω : (Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) ↦ ω.2)
        (indepFun_refl (by fun_prop)))
        |>.mono (by
          intro ω
          funext n
          rfl) (by
          intro ω
          funext n
          rfl)
  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_id_a.indepFun_iff h_id_b).2 h_indep_stream
  simpa [IndepFun] using (h_indep'.mono (by
    intro ω
    funext s
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil]
    | succ n =>
      simp) (by
    intro ω
    funext s
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil]
    | succ n =>
      simp))

simpa [rewardByCount, hab] using
    indepFun_prod (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
      (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ (fun s ↦ (0 : ℝ)))
      (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ (fun s ↦ ω (stepsUntil A a s) a))
      (mX := by fun_prop) (mY := by fun_prop)

classical
  have hId_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have hId_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_eval :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.snd_measure] using
      (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))
  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
        (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_indep_eval.comp_identDistrib hId_a.symm hId_b.symm)
  simpa [IndepFun] using (h_indep'.precomp (g := fun s : ℕ ↦ s - 1) (g' := fun s : ℕ ↦ s - 1))

classical
  have h_id_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_eval : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure, Measure.snd, Measure.snd_prod] using
      (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab).comp_right (μ := 𝔓) Prod.snd
        (by fun_prop)
  have h_indep_shift : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
      (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact h_indep_eval.comp_identDistrib h_id_a.symm h_id_b.symm
  refine h_indep_shift.comp (g₁ := fun s ↦ s - 1) (g₂ := fun s ↦ s - 1) ?_ ?_
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop

classical
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  -- `rewardByCount` depends only on the stream component, and for different actions these
  -- are independent under `streamMeasure ν`; then lift to the product measure.
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ((), ω))
        (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ((), ω)) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    -- reduce to independence of evaluation maps of the stream measure
    -- using the fact that `rewardByCount` has the same law as the corresponding stream eval
    -- and that different coordinates/actions are independent in the product construction.
    -- This lemma is available in the project’s `ForMathlib.IndepFun` development.
    simpa using indepFun_rewardByCount_streamMeasure (ν := ν) hab
  -- pull back along `Prod.snd : Ω × stream → stream`
  have h_indep_precomp :
      IndepFun (fun ωs s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ωs) (fun ωs s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ωs) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Function.comp] using h_indep_stream.precomp (g := Prod.snd)
  exact h_indep_precomp

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_id_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    have h_indep_snd :
        IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      simpa [iIndepFun] using (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν).indepFun hab
    have h_indep_snd' :
        IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ (Prod.snd ω) n a) (fun ω n ↦ (Prod.snd ω) n b) 𝔓 := by
      simpa [Bandit.snd_measure alg ν] using
        (h_indep_snd.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd)
    simpa using h_indep_snd'
  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω)
        𝔓' := by
    exact h_indep_stream.transfer_identDistrib h_id_a.symm h_id_b.symm
  simpa [IndepFun] using
    (h_indep'.comp (by
      classical
      refine (measurable_pi_lambda fun n ↦ ?_)
      simpa [rewardByCount] using
        (measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)).comp measurable_fst)
      (by
      classical
      refine (measurable_pi_lambda fun n ↦ ?_)
      simpa [rewardByCount] using
        (measurable_rewardByCount hA hR b (n + 1)).comp measurable_fst))

simpa [rewardByCount, hab] using
    indepFun_fst_snd (μ := 𝔓')
      (f := fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) a)
      (g := fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) b)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  -- Identify both sequences with two coordinate projections of the independent stream measure.
  have h_id_a :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  -- Independence for distinct coordinates in the stream measure.
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    -- reduce to independence of coordinates on `Bandit.streamMeasure ν`
    have h_indep_snd :
        IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      -- both are measurable w.r.t. disjoint coordinate sets
      simpa using
        (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) (a := a) (b := b) hab)
    -- pull back along `Prod.snd`
    simpa [Bandit.snd_measure alg ν, Measure.snd, IndepFun] using
      h_indep_snd.comp_right measurable_snd measurable_snd
  -- Transfer independence back to `𝔓'` via `IdentDistrib`.
  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
        (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_id_a.indepFun_iff h_id_b).2 h_indep_stream
  -- Reindex `s ↦ s+1` to get the statement for all `s : ℕ`.
  simpa [Function.comp] using
    h_indep'.comp_right (g := fun s : ℕ ↦ s + 1) (h := fun s : ℕ ↦ s + 1)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  have h_id_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_eval :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓'] using
      (indepFun_prod_snd (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
        (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure'' ν) hab)
  have h_indep_succ :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
        (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_indep_eval.comp_identDistrib h_id_a.symm h_id_b.symm)
  simpa [rewardByCount, Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using h_indep_succ

have h_id_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_eval : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓' := by
    have h_indep_snd : IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2) (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2) 𝔓' :=
      indepFun_snd_snd_prod (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
    have h_indep_eval' : IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n ↦ ω.2 n a)
        (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' := by
      refine h_indep_snd.comp ?_ ?_
      · fun_prop
      · fun_prop
    exact h_indep_eval'
  have h_indep_succ :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_id_a.indepFun_iff h_id_b).2 h_indep_eval
  simpa [rewardByCount] using h_indep_succ

have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
        (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h
  have h_indep :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) a) (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [IndepFun, hab] using
      (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure''' (ν := ν) (a := fun i : α × ℕ ↦ i.1)
        (h := fun i j hij ↦ by
          have : i.1 ≠ j.1 := by
            intro hEq
            apply hij
            cases i <;> cases j <;> cases hij
            simp [hEq] )
        (i := (a, 0)) (j := (b, 0)) (by simpa [hab]))
  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) a) (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) b) 𝔓' := by
    have : IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2) (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2) 𝔓' := by
      simpa using indepFun_snd_snd (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
    simpa [IndepFun, Function.comp] using
      (h_indep.comp (measurable_snd.comp (by fun_prop)) (measurable_snd.comp (by fun_prop)))
  have h_congr :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω) =ᵐ[𝔓'] (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) a) := by
    refine ae_of_all _ ?_
    intro ω
    funext s
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, Nat.sub_zero]
    | succ s =>
      simp [rewardByCount]
  have h_congr' :
      (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) =ᵐ[𝔓'] (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 (s - 1) b) := by
    refine ae_of_all _ ?_
    intro ω
    funext s
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, Nat.sub_zero]
    | succ s =>
      simp [rewardByCount]
  exact (h_indep'.ae_eq h_congr h_congr')

classical
  have h₁ :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h₂ :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne ν hab
  have h_indep_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.snd_measure alg ν, Measure.snd] using
      h_indep_stream.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd
  have h_indep_succ :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h₁.indepFun_iff h₂).2 h_indep_stream'
  have h_indep_pos :
      IndepFun (fun ω s : {n : ℕ // 0 < n} ↦ rewardByCount A R a s.1 ω)
        (fun ω s : {n : ℕ // 0 < n} ↦ rewardByCount A R b s.1 ω) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [rewardByCount] using
      h_indep_succ.precomp (g := fun s : {n : ℕ // 0 < n} ↦ s.1 - 1)
        (fun s ↦ by
          have : 0 < s.1 := s.2
          have hs : s.1 = (s.1 - 1) + 1 := by
            simpa [Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add_of_le (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 this), Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm,
              Nat.add_assoc]
          simpa [hs])
  have h_indep_zero :
      IndepFun (fun ω _ : {n : ℕ // n = 0} ↦ rewardByCount A R a 0 ω)
        (fun ω _ : {n : ℕ // n = 0} ↦ rewardByCount A R b 0 ω) 𝔓' := by
    refine (indepFun_const_left _).mono ?_ ?_
    · intro ω s; cases s; simp [rewardByCount]
    · intro ω s; cases s; simp [rewardByCount]
  have h_indep_all :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) 𝔓' := by
    refine indepFun_of_forall_finite_subtype (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω)
      (Y := fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) ?_
    intro t ht
    classical
    by_cases h0 : (0 : ℕ) ∈ t
    · have hpos : IndepFun (fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ 0 < n} ↦ rewardByCount A R a s.1 ω)
        (fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ 0 < n} ↦ rewardByCount A R b s.1 ω) 𝔓' := by
        simpa using h_indep_pos.precomp (g := fun s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ 0 < n} ↦ ⟨s.1, s.2.2⟩)
          (fun i j hij ↦ by
            intro hEq; exact hij (Subtype.ext (by simpa using congrArg Subtype.val hEq)))
      have hzero' :
          IndepFun (fun ω _ : {n // n ∈ t ∧ n = 0} ↦ rewardByCount A R a 0 ω)
            (fun ω _ : {n // n ∈ t ∧ n = 0} ↦ rewardByCount A R b 0 ω) 𝔓' := by
        refine h_indep_zero.precomp (g := fun s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ n = 0} ↦ ⟨s.1, s.2.2⟩)
          (fun i j hij ↦ by
            intro hEq; exact hij (Subtype.ext (by simpa using congrArg Subtype.val hEq)))
      have hmix :
          IndepFun (fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount A R a s.1 ω)
            (fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount A R b s.1 ω) 𝔓' := by
        classical
        simpa [Subtype.forall, Set.mem_setOf_eq] using
          indepFun_subtype_union_of_disjoint
            (X := fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ 0 < n} ↦ rewardByCount A R a s.1 ω)
            (Y := fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ 0 < n} ↦ rewardByCount A R b s.1 ω)
            (X' := fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ n = 0} ↦ rewardByCount A R a 0 ω)
            (Y' := fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t ∧ n = 0} ↦ rewardByCount A R b 0 ω)
            hpos hzero' (by
              intro i j hij
              exact hij (by
                have : (i.1 : ℕ) = j.1 := by
                  have hi : 0 < i.1 := i.2.2
                  have hj : j.1 = 0 := j.2.2
                  exact (Nat.ne_of_gt hi) (by simpa [hj])
                exact Subtype.ext this))
      simpa using hmix
    · have hpos : IndepFun (fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount A R a s.1 ω)
        (fun ω s : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ rewardByCount A R b s.1 ω) 𝔓' := by
        have : ∀ s : {n // n ∈ t}, 0 < s.1 := by
          intro s
          have hs0 : s.1 ≠ 0 := by
            intro hs0
            exact h0 (by simpa [hs0] using s.2)
          exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hs0
        simpa using h_indep_pos.precomp (g := fun s : {n // n ∈ t} ↦ ⟨s.1, this s⟩)
          (fun i j hij ↦ by
            intro hEq; exact hij (Subtype.ext (by simpa using congrArg Subtype.val hEq)))
      simpa using hpos
  simpa [𝔓'] using h_indep_all

have h_id : IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
      (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [IndepFun, hab] using indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab
  have h_indep_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) ω (a, s))
        (fun ω s ↦ (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) ω (b, s)) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa using h_indep_stream
  have h_indep_rewardByCount' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω) ω (a, s))
        (fun ω s ↦ (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω) ω (b, s)) 𝔓' := by
    exact (h_id.indepFun_iff (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).2 h_indep_stream'
  simpa using h_indep_rewardByCount'

classical
  have h_id_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_eval : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure] using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) (a := a) (b := b) hab)
  refine (h_indep_eval.comp_identDistrib h_id_a.symm h_id_b.symm).mono ?_ ?_
  · intro ω; ext s <;> cases s <;> simp
  · intro ω; ext s <;> cases s <;> simp

classical
  have hId :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
        (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h
  have hIndepStream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω s b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [indepFun_iff_iIndepFun_finset] using
      (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_injective ν (by
        intro i j hij
        rcases Prod.ext_iff.mp hij with ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
        exact hab (h₂.trans h₁.symm)))
  have hIndepStream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.snd_measure alg ν] using
      (hIndepStream.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd)
  have hIndepStream'' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.snd_prod] using (hIndepStream'.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd)
  have hIndepReward :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) 𝔓' := by
    have hIda :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s a) 𝔓' 𝔓' := by
      refine (IdentDistrib.pi (fun n ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_)
      · cases n with
        | zero =>
          refine (IdentDistrib.refl (Measurable.aemeasurable ?_))
          fun_prop
        | succ n =>
          simpa using
            (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h a
                (n + 1) n (by simp))
      · have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h a
        simpa [iIndepFun] using h_indep
      · change iIndepFun (fun n ↦ ((fun ω ↦ ω.2 n a) ∘ id)) 𝔓'
        simpa using (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure'' (ν := ν) a).comp (μ := 𝔓') measurable_snd
    have hIdb :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) (fun ω s ↦ ω.2 s b) 𝔓' 𝔓' := by
      refine (IdentDistrib.pi (fun n ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_)
      · cases n with
        | zero =>
          refine (IdentDistrib.refl (Measurable.aemeasurable ?_))
          fun_prop
        | succ n =>
          simpa using
            (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h b
                (n + 1) n (by simp))
      · have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h b
        simpa [iIndepFun] using h_indep
      · change iIndepFun (fun n ↦ ((fun ω ↦ ω.2 n b) ∘ id)) 𝔓'
        simpa using (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure'' (ν := ν) b).comp (μ := 𝔓') measurable_snd
    exact (hIndepStream''.mono_identDistrib hIda.symm hIdb.symm)
  simpa using hIndepReward

classical
  have h_id :
      IdentDistrib
        (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
        (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) a) (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [Function.comp] using
      (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab).comp
        (f := fun (s : ℕ) ↦ s - 1) (g := fun (s : ℕ) ↦ s - 1) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have h_indep_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) a) (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) b) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [Measure.snd] using (indepFun_fst_prod_snd (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) h_indep_stream)
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun
        (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω)
        (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    have h_indep_p :
        IndepFun
          (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
          (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
      simpa using (iIndepFun.indepFun (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h) (fun _ ↦ (a, ·)) (fun _ ↦ (b, ·))
        (by
          intro i
          intro j
          exact congrArg Prod.fst (by simpa using (show (a, i) ≠ (b, j) from by
            intro h'
            exact hab (by simpa using congrArg Prod.fst h')))))
    have h_indep_q :
        IndepFun (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ ω p.2 p.1) (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ ω p.2 p.1)
          (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      simpa using (iIndepFun.indepFun (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure' ν) (fun _ ↦ (a, ·)) (fun _ ↦ (b, ·))
        (by
          intro i
          intro j
          exact congrArg Prod.fst (by simpa using (show (a, i) ≠ (b, j) from by
            intro h'
            exact hab (by simpa using congrArg Prod.fst h')))))
    have h_indep_ab :
        IndepFun
          (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
          (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
      refine (h_id.indepFun_iff ?_ ?_).2 ?_
      · fun_prop
      · fun_prop
      · simpa using h_indep_q
    simpa using h_indep_ab
  refine h_indep_prod.comp (f := fun s ↦ s - 1) (g := fun s ↦ s - 1) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) |>.congr
    (fun ω => by
      funext s
      cases s with
      | zero =>
        simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, Nat.zero_eq]
      | succ s =>
        simp [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm])
    (fun ω => by
      funext s
      cases s with
      | zero =>
        simp [rewardByCount, stepsUntil, Nat.zero_eq]
      | succ s =>
        simp [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm])

classical
  have h_id_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_id_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure] using
      (indepFun_prod_of_indepFun_snd
        (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
        (X := fun ω : (Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) ↦ ω.2 (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ (p.1, p.2)) (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ (p.1, p.2)) (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ (p.1, p.2)) )
        (Y := fun ω : (Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) ↦ ω.2 (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ (p.1, p.2)) (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ (p.1, p.2)) (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ (p.1, p.2)) ))
  refine (h_id_a.indepFun_iff.mp ?_).1
  · exact h_id_b.symm
  · simpa using h_indep_stream

classical
  have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
        (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) (alg := alg) (ν := ν) h
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) a) (fun ω s ↦ ω (s - 1) b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa [IndepFun, iIndepFun_iff] using
      (Bandit.indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (Prod.snd ω - 1) a)
        (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (Prod.snd ω - 1) b) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', IndepFun, Measure.prod, Measure.map_map] using
      (h_indep_stream.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd)
  refine (h_id.indepFun_iff ?_ ?_).2 ?_
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop
  · simpa [rewardByCount] using h_indep_prod

classical
  have hId_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have hId_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have hInd_stream : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    have hInd_snd : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      simpa using (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)
    simpa [Bandit.snd_measure] using hInd_snd.comp measurable_snd measurable_snd
  refine (hId_a.indepFun_iff hId_b).2 ?_
  have hInd_stream' :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa using (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)
  have hInd_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ (ω.2) n a) (fun ω n ↦ (ω.2) n b) 𝔓' := by
    simpa using (indepFun_snd_prod (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) hInd_stream')
  have hMeas_a :
      Measurable (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a s ω) := by
    fun_prop [measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a]
  have hMeas_b :
      Measurable (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b s ω) := by
    fun_prop [measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R b]
  have hMeas_a' : Measurable (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) := by
    simpa [Function.comp] using (hMeas_a.comp (measurable_id.prod_mk (measurable_add_const 1)))
  have hMeas_b' : Measurable (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) := by
    simpa [Function.comp] using (hMeas_b.comp (measurable_id.prod_mk (measurable_add_const 1)))
  have hInd_shift :
      IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) 𝔓' := by
    have hId_a' :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R a (s + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hId_a
    have hId_b' :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R b (s + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 := by
      simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hId_b
    exact (hId_a'.indepFun_iff hId_b').2 hInd_prod
  refine hInd_shift.comp ?_ ?_
  · exact measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_add_const
  · exact measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_add_const

classical
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_ident_a : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h a
  have h_ident_b : IdentDistrib (fun ω n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1) ω) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓' 𝔓 :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h b
  have h_indep_stream : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure] using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne (ν := ν) hab)
  refine (h_ident_a.indepFun_iff h_ident_b).2 ?_
  exact h_indep_stream
